title: "Found error in internal cell" when comparing signed against negated square root

features.name: signed_comparison_with_negated_sqrt
features.description: Code should include a comparison between a signed value and a negated system function call where the negated result is incorrectly treated as unsigned, causing sign extension mismatch
features.snippet:
input signed [7:0] x;
assign y = x > -$sqrt(9);

features.name: signed_to_unsigned_comparison_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a greater-than comparison between a signed operand and an unsigned operand derived from a negated function result, where the signedness parameter mismatch causes incorrect two's complement interpretation
